title: Game of Reborn
description: Give you a second chance even when you died in game.
body:
If you unfortunately died in your Minecraft game but you've gotten a special totem from this mod,

you won't lose everything as it usually was,

but be teleported to a new dimension Deadzone _(Not the Backroom)_,

where you can fight a boss and return to where you died if you win.

Use the command **/enableReborn** to switch on/off the function.
Default value is true.
